taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Full Stack Engineer
must_have_quals: 3+ years of relevant experience, ideally in a fast-paced or product-driven environment, Proficiency with modern software technologies, with ability to quickly learn and contribute within our tech stack, Growth-minded and eager to learn, adapting quickly to new challenges and priorities in a dynamic environment, Effective communicator and team player, able to collaborate with technical and non-technical stakeholders
core_responsibilities: Developing and enhancing features for our enterprise-grade APIs, web applications, and dashboards, Working on the implementation of new data supplier integrations, Improving and deploying features based on existing data models for new attributes and scores, Take ownership of defined features, delivering with quality and support, Actively participate in team norms (e.g., project planning, code reviews, QA, on-call rotation), Collaborate effectively within your engineering team as well as with product and design to ensure successful execution on team projects, Deepen your knowledge of specific product areas and take action on identified improvements, Understand how your work directly contributes to our business goals and products, Successfully deliver multiple features, from implementation to deployment, Become proficient in your product vertical and related technical artifacts
job_summary: Nova Credit is on a mission to power financial inclusion globally by building a unified platform for credit and financial data. The Mid-Level Software Engineer will contribute to high-impact initiatives, implement robust solutions across products and platforms, and collaborate with experienced engineers to enhance their technical skills.
